title: Phase 36 — Avatar dedup, pull-to-refresh social, haptic set, toast/contrast

stories.title: PostSessionScreen: Alert → toast.error
stories.description: In the catch block at PostSessionScreen.tsx:292-297, replace Alert.alert('Séance non sauvegardée', ...) with toast.error(). This aligns with the app-wide pattern of using non-blocking toasts for errors instead of modal alerts.
acceptance: toast.error() called with a brief message when save fails

stories.title: LeaderboardScreen + GroupsScreen: add pull-to-refresh
stories.description: LeaderboardScreen and GroupsScreen both have data-loading via useEffect but no RefreshControl. Add pull-to-refresh using the same pattern as FriendsScreen: refreshing state, loadData(isRefresh) function, RefreshControl with tintColor='#EFBF04' on the main FlatList/ScrollView.
acceptance: LeaderboardScreen has refreshing state and RefreshControl on FlatList
GroupsScreen has refreshing state and RefreshControl on FlatList/ScrollView
Initial loading (loading && !refreshing) still shows full-screen ActivityIndicator

stories.title: ActiveSessionScreen: haptic feedback on set complete
stories.description: handleSetComplete() in ActiveSessionScreen.tsx triggers completeSet() and shows RestTimer but gives no haptic feedback. Add hapticSuccess() from utils/haptics.ts at the start of handleSetComplete to provide physical confirmation that the set was logged.
acceptance: Import from utils/haptics or wherever the haptic helpers live
No other changes to handleSetComplete logic

stories.title: ActivityFeedScreen: timestamp contrast fix
stories.description: The timestamp style in ActivityFeedScreen.tsx uses color: '#666' which has insufficient contrast ratio against the dark background #121212. Change to 'rgba(255,255,255,0.4)' to match the app's standard for secondary text on dark.

stories.title: AvatarCircle: extract shared component
stories.description: AvatarCircle is defined as a local component in both FriendsScreen.tsx and LeaderboardScreen.tsx, with a third inline avatar in ActivityFeedScreen.tsx. Extract a shared AvatarCircle component to components/ui/AvatarCircle.tsx that supports optional size (default 40) and borderColor props. Update all three files to use the shared component.
acceptance: New file components/ui/AvatarCircle.tsx exports AvatarCircle with props { pseudo: string; size?: number; borderColor?: string }
FriendsScreen: local AvatarCircle function removed, imports from components/ui/AvatarCircle
LeaderboardScreen: local AvatarCircle memo removed, imports from components/ui/AvatarCircle
ActivityFeedScreen: inline avatar View replaced with <AvatarCircle pseudo={...} />
Visual output identical to before — initials displayed, correct background/size/border
